title: R5A district (pitched-roof envelope) - maximum perimeter-wall height and maximum ridge/building height
description: DRAFT extraction (needs_review) of the pitched-roof envelope HEIGHT constraints for the exact R5A district per NYC Zoning Resolution section 23-421 (City of Yes, Last Amended 2024-12-05). Two SEPARATE typed constraints are emitted, both measured ABOVE THE BASE PLANE: maximum perimeter-wall height (25 ft) and maximum ridge/building height (35 ft). R5A is a distinct pitched-roof envelope, encoded SEPARATELY from R5/R5B/R5D - no dimension is inherited. FAIL-CLOSED INPUT: applicability is conditional on BUILDING TYPE (detached / semi-detached / zero-lot-line per section 23-421); the canonical property_profile exposes NO building-type field, so building_type is a REQUIRED input with no canonical source - when it is missing/unavailable the evaluation returns professional_review_required with NO value (this is also the flat-vs-pitched envelope selection failing closed). The R5A setback is governed by pitched-plane (sky-exposure) geometry, NOT the flat section 23-423 10/15-ft rule, and is a documented limitation (professional review), not a numeric constraint. NOT a Verified determination.

citations.quote: Perimeter walls are subject to setback regulations at a maximum height above the base plane of 25 feet. These planes start at the maximum permitted height of the perimeter walls and meet at a ridge line of 35 feet above the base plane.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: Residence district governing the lot. Applicability equals R5A (via in_set); R5/R5B/R5D are NOT matched.

inputs.name: building_type
inputs.description: Building type the section 23-421 pitched-roof envelope applies to. REQUIRED and FAIL-CLOSED: no canonical property_profile field exposes building type, so in practice this is unavailable and the evaluation returns professional_review_required with no value - the pitched envelope is never assumed.

inputs.name: overlay_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.commercial_overlays[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

inputs.name: special_district_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.special_districts[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

inputs.name: historic_district
inputs.description: True iff the lot is in a designated Historic District (section 23-426); when a caller supplies true -> professional_review_required.

outputs.name: max_perimeter_wall_height
outputs.description: Maximum perimeter-wall height (ft) ABOVE THE BASE PLANE. Separate typed constraint; not a buildable-envelope result.

outputs.name: max_building_height
outputs.description: Maximum ridge/building height (ft) ABOVE THE BASE PLANE. Separate typed constraint; not a buildable-envelope result.

parameters.name: perimeter_wall_height_ft
parameters.note: R5A maximum perimeter-wall height 25 ft above the base plane (section 23-421). Candidate value pending raw-HTML verification and G6 approval.

parameters.name: ridge_height_ft
parameters.note: R5A maximum ridge/building height 35 ft above the base plane (section 23-421). Candidate value pending raw-HTML verification and G6 approval.

steps.note: Maximum perimeter-wall height above the base plane for R5A (section 23-421).
Maximum ridge/building height above the base plane for R5A (section 23-421).

exceptions.description: The R5A setback is governed by pitched-plane (sky-exposure) geometry rising from the perimeter-wall height to the 35 ft ridge, NOT the flat section 23-423 10/15-ft rule. It is not reduced to a single numeric depth here and requires professional review.
A commercial overlay may modify residence-district height (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.
A mapped special district may modify height (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.
In a designated Historic District the perimeter-wall height may be required to match adjacent buildings (section 23-426); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.

uncertainty_policy.note: An uncertain, split, sliver, or invalid M2-T013 geometric district assignment is never collapsed into a single definitive district: coverage downgrades to professional_review_required (or data_conflict).

limitations: Draft extraction pending raw-HTML source verification and G6 qualified-human legal approval; not a Verified determination.
Heights are measured ABOVE THE BASE PLANE (section 23-421), not above curb; the base-plane determination is a separate professional input.
Applicability requires a building type (detached / semi-detached / zero-lot-line) that has no canonical property_profile field; without it the rule fails closed to professional_review_required.
The R5A setback is pitched-plane geometry, not a flat depth; it is surfaced as a documented limitation / professional review, not a numeric setback constraint.
The section 23-424 qualifying-residential-site alternative (base 45 / building 55) is a SEPARATE rule (r5-qrs-height) and applies only where the section 12-10 test is met.
